name: Sichuan Dowell Science and Technology Inc.
summary: Sichuan Dowell Science and Technology Inc. researches, develops, produces, and sells leather chemicals in China. The company offers tanning materials, leather functional additives, finishing materials, and colorants, industrial coating, waterborne wood paints; and wood adhesive, as well as provides intelligent device. It also exports its products to Southeast Asia, Europe, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.
